name: Moxies Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: No evidence found of a school bus operator named 'Moxies Inc' at 730 Colusa Ave, El Cerrito, CA. The 'Which Will Do Bus' suffix is a parsing artifact from California Secretary of State filings (truncation of '...which will do business as...'). No CA SoS, FMCSA, or local district records tie this entity to student transportation.
fit_notes: Likely a data artifact / non-operator. The dataset record appears to be a generic CA corporate filing mislabeled as a school-bus company; recommend removing from target list.

name: Sparrows Inc Which Will Do Bus
owner_or_parent: Sparrows Online, Inc. (Delaware foreign stock corp; venture-backed)
recent_news: CA Secretary of State entity C4621755 'SPARROWS, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS SPARROWS ONLINE, INC.' is a Delaware foreign stock corporation registered July 2020 at 3105 Bandera Dr, Palo Alto. LinkedIn lists Sparrows as a Social Networking Platforms company (2-10 employees, HQ Portola Valley, founded 2019). Not a school bus operator.
fit_notes: NOT a student transportation operator. Mislabeled dataset entry (social-networking tech startup). Exclude from Summit tuck-in target list.

name: Cuddle Academy Trnsprtn Svc
recent_news: Owner-operated child transportation service in Center Point/Birmingham AL run by Virginetta Fletcher. Offers door-to-door pickup/drop-off 6am-5pm at $50-75/week per child, payments via Cash App ($cuddleacademy) and Apple Pay. Marketed via Nextdoor, Yelp, and Facebook. No evidence of yellow-bus fleet or district contracts.
fit_notes: Too small/informal for Summit tuck-in. Appears to be a sole-proprietor private-pay child-ride service (closer to nanny-shuttle than school-bus contractor); 49-employee figure in dataset is almost certainly inflated. Not viable as platform addition.

name: M & G School Bus
districts_or_customers: Perth Amboy / Middlesex County NJ area (specific district contracts not disclosed)
recent_news: M&G School Bus Service LLC, USDOT 3388249, 701 Gornik Dr, Perth Amboy NJ, founded 2015. Female-owned LLC operating 19 power units with 17 drivers; classified as intrastate passenger (non-HM). Received $45K PPP loan via Santander Bank in April 2020 (paid in full). No safety rating assigned; active status. Cortera lists sales range $5M-$9.99M (likely overstated vs. 19-bus fleet).
fit_notes: Legitimate small NJ school-bus operator (~19 buses, female-owned, ~10 years old). Sub-scale even for a tuck-in but could be a bolt-on in dense Middlesex County NJ corridor where Summit/Durham already operates. Worth a low-priority outreach to identify principal (not publicly disclosed) and gauge succession interest.

name: Aces I/O Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: ACES I/O Inc. (aces-io.com) is an event and production consultancy founded ~2019, contact email hello@aces-io.com, listed at 2351 W Silver Lake Dr, Los Angeles. The 'Which Will Do Bus' suffix is a truncation artifact from CA Secretary of State filing ('which will do business as'). Not a student transportation provider.
fit_notes: NOT a school bus operator. Mislabeled dataset entry (event/production consultancy at a residential Silver Lake address). Exclude from Summit tuck-in target list.
